title: Items In Hands!
description: Now in first person view weapons and tools are in your hands
body:
### This resource pack makes the things in your hands really _**feel like they're in your hands**_.
![Sword in hands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a6b46455edae0d50ee223d06de9f7ce740add63.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Y-9p80cFcOg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### All tools, swords, bows and fishing rods have been converted to first-person view.

The resource pack has disadvantages, such as incompatibility with left-handed view, or swing animation mods, etc., there are also small visual bugs, for example with skeletons. But everything is in your hands, I hope to see an improved version of this pack someday

### The screenshot shows how to change the hand texture to the texture from your skin.
![The screenshot shows how to change the hand texture to the texture from your skin.-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d086ab8f82d7038ca4ae8d8c60dc2297818b6ab1.png)

### It is recommended to use the resource pack with the [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) and [First Person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) mods
Also, bow and crossbow models made by [ewanhowell5195](https://modrinth.com/user/ewanhowell5195)
